title: Easy Trifle

html:
Ingredients

  • 1 moist Swiss roll
  • 200 ml sherry
  • 125 ml cherries
  • 125 ml pecan nuts
  • 125 ml walnuts
  • 50 ml cream
  • 125 ml glazed ginger
  • 125 ml green figs
  • custard – enough

Method

Start with the Swiss roll and sprinkle sherry over.

Sprinkle with cherries and nuts.

Now pour custard over.

Repeat the layers and finish with a layer of cream.

Decorate with fresh fig halves and nuts.
